chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-276 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.863/2022 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.831/2022 4. For hearing of main case 25.03.2022 Mr. Abdul Sattar Sarki, Advocate for petitioner. *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioner by way of instant petition under the garb of harassment has sought for restraint against the official respondents from registering the FIR against him and his family members and from arresting them at the instance of their rivals without permission of this Court. The registration of criminal case and arrest of the accused involved therein on the basis of well-founded accusation is legal function, same could not be prevented by this Court under the garb of protection; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with pending application. JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
